---
title: "MLOps Companion"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Role In This Course

The MLOps companion submodule provides optional worked examples for production ML engineering topics that sit around the core IPCV localization project.

Use these pages when a lesson needs a concrete external example of configuration, data versioning, model packaging, CI/CD, deployment, or monitoring.

## Rendered Source

The rendered pages are prepared from `external/mlops-hands-on-tutorial/`, which is included as a Git submodule.

```bash
git submodule update --init external/mlops-hands-on-tutorial
```

Quarto writes render-safe copies to `generated/mlops-hands-on-tutorial/` during the site pre-render step.

## Suggested Mapping

- Week 0 project setup supports `00 Course Setup`
- Week 2 Hydra configuration supports `04 Production Architecture`
- Week 3 DVC supports `06 Data Workflows`
- Week 4 ONNX and Week 5 Docker support handoff and packaging discussions
- Week 6 GitHub Actions supports CI and automation discussions
- Week 9 monitoring supports `07 Evaluation And Observability`

## Boundary

The companion material is rendered in the course site, but it remains third-party reference material. The default IPCV workflow still uses `uv`, local configs, deterministic tests, DVC boundaries, and MLflow logging as the primary course path.
